title: Onboarding - Organized, Up-to-Date, Personal screens - App in the background
scenario: Onboarding flow persists on the same page with animation still working after app is backgrounded for 1-2 minutes on Organized, Up-to-Date, and Personal screens
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. Begin the onboarding flow and navigate to the "Organized" screen.
3. Press the Home button (or gesture) to put the app into the background.
5. Reopen the app from the recent apps list or home screen.
6. Observe the current screen and animation state.
expected: The app remains on the same onboarding screen (Organized, Up-to-Date, or Personal) with the animation still playing/working correctly.
